entries.completion_basis: Prime Reborn cutover source merged after final whole-program Strikeforce GREEN

entries.readiness_basis: RP-C01 and AJ-03 are PROVEN from genuine non-owner run 29421543076 with OWNER_IDENTITY_REJECTED, skipped Thread Engine invocation, exact zero-mutation evidence, unchanged canonical main, and temporary access removal. AJ-11 clean-clone recovery is next. AJ-12, CAP-027, RP-C08, Phoenix recovery, and final Quest closeout remain open.

FS-C01-M02 and FS-C01-M03 construction are accepted from exact authored lineage, Ubuntu and Windows validation, detached review, canonical synthetic exercise, immutable recovery, and read-only rollback evidence. FS-C01-M04 still requires a Jayson-selected protected external store and bounded trusted provider/runtime usage evidence.
